High-performance computing centres are natural early adopters of quantum computing because they already operate advanced infrastructure, support complex scientific workloads, and serve research, government, and industrial users.

interaction_phrase: integrate directly into existing HPC environments
occurrence_sentence: Anyon designs and deploys operational quantum systems that integrate directly into existing HPC environments: a qubit superconducting system built for automated, no-liquid-cryogen, water-cooled operation within existing HPC fabric.
